title: Frequently Asked Questions
subtitle: Answers to common questions about products

items.question: How can I track my order?
items.answer: After placing your order, a tracking code will be sent to you via email or SMS, and you can view the status in the 'Order Tracking' section.

items.question: What payment methods are available in the store?
items.answer: You can choose online payment with bank cards, cash on delivery, or use the internal wallet of the website.

items.question: How are shipping costs and delivery time calculated?
items.answer: Shipping costs are determined based on product weight and destination, and delivery time varies between 2 to 7 business days.

items.question: Is it possible to return or exchange a product?
items.answer: For some products, return or exchange is possible within 7 days after receiving the item in case of issues or dissatisfaction, but some products are excluded due to hygiene conditions or their specific nature.

items.question: How can I use discounts and coupons?
items.answer: Enter your discount code at the checkout stage to have the amount deducted from your order.

items.question: Do the products come with a warranty?
items.answer: Yes, most products come with an official manufacturer warranty, and detailed information is provided on the product page.

items.question: How can I manage my user account?
items.answer: By logging into your account, you can manage your addresses, orders, favorites, and personal information.

items.question: Is wholesale or special ordering available?
items.answer: For wholesale purchases or special orders, please contact the store support to receive special conditions.
